Terms & Conditions

Operating principles and user agreements for our financial ecosystem.

Effective Date: April 9, 2026 Version 1.2

1 Acceptance of Terms

By accessing and using Quick Financial Calculator, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree, please refrain from using our tools.

2 Nature of Service

The calculators provided on this platform are for educational and informational purposes only. They are designed to assist in preliminary financial planning and do not constitute professional financial, tax, or legal advice.

Professional Consultation: We strongly recommend consulting with a certified financial planner or auditor before making significant financial decisions based on these results.

3 Accuracy of Results

While we strive for audit-grade accuracy in our formulas, Quick Financial Calculator does not guarantee that the results are error-free or applicable to your specific regional banking laws. Financial variables such as taxes, insurance, and closing costs are often estimates.

4 Intellectual Property

All content, design elements, and logic within this platform are the property of Md. Merajul Islam unless otherwise stated. You may:

  • Use the calculators for personal or small business needs.
  • Share links to our tools.

You may not scrape our formulas or redistribute our source code without explicit written permission.

5 Limitation of Liability

Under no circumstances shall the maintainer of Quick Financial Calculator be liable for any financial loss, damage, or legal issues arising from the use or inability to use our tools. Users assume full responsibility for the data entered and the decisions made thereafter.

If you have questions regarding these terms, please contact us via the Support Page.

Quick Financial Calculator

Precision-engineered financial tools for professionals and auditors worldwide.
